  "attack_summary": "Two instances of svchost.exe were observed repeatedly creating and modifying a non-standard registry key, HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider\\StartTime. This behavior is highly indicative of malware establishing persistence and evading detection by masquerading as legitimate Windows services.
